commands.review_summary:
The PR updates diagnostic memory pressure logging to include human-readable units, threshold percentage, an operator hint, and WARN-level emission for warning pressure, with colocated test coverage.

PR surface: Source +51, Tests +47. Total +98 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.1 both show warning memory pressure logs built with raw byte fields and emitted through log.info(); I did not execute the repro because this review was read-only.
